summary:
Failed (assertion) on step 8: TEST FAILURE

The return confirmation flow did not complete successfully — an error was shown when attempting to process the return.

Observations:
- After clicking the 'Konfirmasi Pengembalian' button, the page displayed the alert 'Gagal memproses pengembalian.'
- No success message or UI state indicating the loan status changed to "Tersedia" was observed.
- The return confirmation dialog remains visible and the action was not completed.
